social_signals: DHA pe itna smog hai ke haath bhi nazar nahi aa raha. Aankhein jal rahi hain.
Zero visibility on Ferozpur Road. Multiple near-misses already this morning. Extremely dangerous.
Shahrah-e-Faisal pe accident ho gaya smog ki wajah se. 3 gaariyan takra gayi hain.
Thokar Niaz Baig pe visibility bilkul zero hai. Headlights bhi kaam nahi kar rahi. Ghar pe raho please.
AQI reading 387 at DHA Y-block. This is hazardous. Schools must close immediately.
Ferozpur Road pe lorry ka accident ho gaya. Visibility nahi thi. Ek banda zakhmi hai.
Worst smog episode of the year. Main Boulevard DHA looks like a ghost road. Visibility under 50 meters.
Bachon ko school mat bhejo aaj. Ferozpur Road pe saans lena mushkil ho raha hai. Smog bohat zyada hai.
Cantt area completely covered in smog blanket. Airport Road also affected.
Meri maa ko asthma attack aa gaya smog ki wajah se. Hospital le ja raha hun.
Traffic moving at crawl pace on Shahrah-e-Faisal. Accident risk very high. Fog lamps must.
Ferozpur Road toll plaza ke paas 5 gaariyan ek saath takra gayi. RESCUE 1122 bulao jaldi.
